title: rousselia humilis
intro: Rousselia humilis is a tropical plant species, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the velvet-leaf or velvet-rose plant. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Rousselia humilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
